Anabolic SEO:
Onsite Optimization
About Onsite Optimization:
System Description: This is a basic onsite search engine opti-
mization system. This system involves performing keyword re-
search, creating several web pages, optimizing those pages for
the selected keywords, and creating an optimized blog post.
Required Skills: No previous skillset is required, although experi-
ence with keyword research and good writing ability are a plus.
System Checklist:
Step 1: Keyword Research, Video 2
1. Brainstorm keywords in your business.
2. Plug them into Wordtracker, Keyword Discov-
ery, and Google Adwords tool and build a large
keyword list.
3. Break down the keywords into groups of five to six.
4. Take out keywords that aren’t related to the business
(put them in a seperate “rejected” keyword list).
Step 2: Onsite SEO, Video 1
1. Create a home page for each group of keywords.
2. Use your primary keyword in the title tag of each
page.
3. Include other keywords not used in the title tags in
Weekly Action Plan:
Day 1 Task Checklist:
Brainstorm keywords related
to your niche.
Plug them into Wordtracker,
Keyword Discovery and
Google Adwords tool and
build a large keyword list.
Break down the keywords into
groups of five to six.
Take out keywords that aren’t
related to your business and
put them in a rejected list.
Day 2 Task Checklist:
Create a home page for each
group of keywords.
Use your primary keyword in
the title tag of each page.
Include keywords not used
in the title tag in the copy on
your page.
Create links to other areas
of your site that match your
keywords.

-- 1 of 2 --

the copy on your page.
4. Create links to other areas of your site that match
your keywords.
5. Don’t keyword stuff. Use the keywords naturally on
your page.
Step 3: Create a Blog Post, Video 3
1. Make sure your primary keyword is in the title of
your blog.
2. Create your blog post in Wordpress.
3. Find trackbacks to the blog post and put them on
your blog.
4. Look for popular blogs and find trackbacks you can
post responses to.
System Checklist:	Weekly Action Plan:
Day 3 Task Checklist:
Make sure your primary
keyword is in the title of
your blog.
Create a blog post and sub-
mit it through Wordpress.
Insert keywords in the Meta
description of your page.
Use your main keywords in
the anchor text of your page.
Make sure you have related
keywords in your blog post.
Italicize and bold one to two
instances of your main key-
word in your blog post.
Make sure your main key-
word is in the alt-image tag.
Find trackbacks to the blog
post and put them on your
blog.
Look for popular blogs and
find trackbacks you can post
responses to.
Keyword Research Tools:
www.WordTracker.com
www.KeywordDiscovery.com
http://adwords.google.com/
select/KeywordToolExternal
Resources:
Tips for Making the Most of This Traffic System:
It takes time to see results with this system. Google can take
between 15 minutes and two months before it indexes your page
and gives you decent rankings. So use this traffic system as a
long-term strategy.

-- 2 of 2 --
